story.so_that: I can search for active tactics efficiently
story.i_want: receive first page search results within 3 seconds

journey.before: User needs to search through active tactics but experiences slow search response times that impact productivity
journey.during: User submits search query with filters and waits for results to be returned from the database
journey.after: User receives search results within 3 seconds and can view, filter, or refine their search with new tactics immediately visible

capability_breakdown.core_action: Optimize search performance to return first page results within 3 seconds while maintaining existing filter functionality
state_changes: Search results are updated when new tactics are created

acceptance_criteria.gherkin: Given I am an Internal Requester When I use any existing search filters Then the filters continue to work as before And the search results are returned within 3 seconds
acceptance_criteria.jtbd: Apply search filters without performance degradation

acceptance_criteria.gherkin: Given I am an Internal Requester and I previously completed a search and a NEW Tactic was just created When I search again Then the new tactic should be included in the search results AND the search results should be returned within 3 seconds
acceptance_criteria.jtbd: See newly created tactics in search results

acceptance_criteria.gherkin: Given a user submits a search query When the search completes Then results are returned within 3 seconds
Given existing API consumers When they call search endpoints Then the API contracts remain unchanged
